name: Honey Roasted Chicken
recipeInstructions:
1. Preheat oven to 425°F.
2. In a small bowl, whisk together olive oil, orange juice, honey, and paprika.
3. Brush chicken pieces generously with the olive oil mixture.
4. Arrange chicken in a roasting pan. Roast for 15 minutes.
5. Reduce oven temperature to 400°F. Baste chicken again with the olive oil mixture.
6. Continue roasting chicken, basting occasionally, until it is no longer pink in the center and juices run clear.
7. Makes 4 servings
